name: Pull Request
about: Submit changes to lessel
title: ''
labels: ''

**Related issue(s)**
Closes # (fill in the issue number this PR addresses)

**Description**
A clear and concise description of the changes you're introducing.

**Type of change**
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / code style
- [ ] CI / build / tooling

**Checklist**
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My code follows the existing code style
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix or feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] I have added JSDoc / TypeDoc comments for new public APIs

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the PR here, such as screenshots or design considerations.
